TranslationContext: This file contains Unit Names for the Greenskin Tribes Faction.

Translations.Comment: Literal translation: green-skin tribes. Maintains the fantasy wargame tone and savage aesthetic.
Compound word: beast-human warriors. Maintains brutal and martial tone.
Conveys brutality and savage strength, appropriate for the heavy hitter unit.
Conveys the chaotic, horde-like nature of goblins in combat.
Identifies the weapon type (spear) while maintaining mob descriptor.
Wild boar riders emphasize the savage, primal nature of greenskin cavalry.
Wolf riders showcase goblin speed and predatory tactics.
Epic heavy unit combining orc strength with boar-drawn chariot power.
Shortbow archers provide ranged support; compact weapons suit goblin physiology.
Heavy ranged unit with crossbow weapons; consistent terminology with other factions.
Artillery unit; stonethrower conveys crude but effective siege capability.
Mythical creatures; strong, regenerative melee unit fitting greenskin roster.
Powerful rare unit; generic term emphasizes raw size and strength.
Two-winged dragon variant; rare flying mount transcending typical greenskin aesthetic.
Monstrous unit embodying alien, predatory nature of arachnid horror.
Tribal leader character; war chief title emphasizes martial prowess and authority.
Spellcaster character; shaman emphasizes tribal magic and mystical connection.
Supreme faction leader; grand title conveying dominion and power.
